subcodes.first_line: O severed servant of the Abhá Beauty! Thou hadst written that in the environs of the verdant lands thou wert in utmost poverty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده منقطع جمال ابهی مرقوم نموده بودی که در اطراف خضراء در نهایت فقر و
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
